author: Rahul M.
content: Six weeks in and there's noticeably less hair in the drain. I put it on during IPL matches — 20 minutes flies by.

author: Priya S.
content: The comb head for scalp, mushroom for face. Ten minutes twice a week. My oil routine finally feels like it's doing something.

author: Arjun K.
content: Bought this on a whim. Now it's part of my night routine — massage, then serum. Scalp feels less tight.

author: Neha R.
content: Fits my head fine (I'm on the smaller side). Timer would be nice but I just use my phone. Sticking to Mon-Wed-Fri.

author: Vikram P.
content: Solid build. Mild tingle on level 2 — start at 1 if you're new to this. Serum seems to absorb faster after a session.

author: Ananya T.
content: Use it in the shower twice a week. Gentle on my sensitive scalp, battery lasts about a week between charges.
